ogTitle: Marion Bay vs Markaranka: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Marion Bay and Markaranka.
heading: Marion Bay vs Markaranka — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Marion Bay, South Australia and Markaranka, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Markaranka has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Marion Bay (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Marion Bay or Markaranka safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Marion Bay has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Markaranka scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Marion Bay scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Markaranka scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Marion Bay or Markaranka?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Markaranka has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
